events.content: "detail": "Appended Check 9d (Prior Art / Constraints elicitation) to Step 9 pre-mortem list. 9d FAIL conditions: (a) section absent; (b) all 3 subsections empty without coverage note; (c) guard-string still present (Step 0.5 partial).
